steps.title: Factor out the variable
steps.content:
Combine the terms with $x$ by factoring:
$$-4x+20px=(-4+20p)x$$
So the equation becomes $(-4+20p)x=100$.

steps.title: Force a contradiction
steps.content:
For the equation to have no solution, the coefficient of $x$ must be $0$, leaving the impossible statement $0=100$. Set the coefficient equal to $0$:
$$-4+20p=0$$
$$20p=4$$
$$p=\frac{1}{5}$$
The answer is D.
